Site Visit Report

Project
Fairway
Date
July 17, 2026
Prepared For
Sanchez Fairways
Prepared By
Juliette Calaf Interiors
Butler's Pantry
The wall is to be moved 4 inches to achieve 48-inch clearance. The AC drain will be eliminated and rerouted down the wall. Plumbing and electrical locations are confirmed and marked on site.
The electrical box will be addressed as part of the wall relocation. Electrical and plumbing trades are coordinated to complete rough-in in this zone.
Kitchen
Plumbing and electrical locations are confirmed and marked on the floor and walls. Finalization is scheduled for next Friday.
Throughout
All interior doors are scheduled for restoration. A quote has been received at $1,020 per door. Pending client approval to proceed with millwork coordination.
Copper plumbing work is complete throughout. All previously open connections have been welded and the piping is finished.
Additional view of completed copper plumbing work throughout the project.
Boys' Bedroom / Mezzanine
Electrical work in the Boys' Room is in process. Mezzanine work is scheduled to begin next week.
Girls' Bedroom
Electrical outlet and sconce locations are confirmed. Rough-in is scheduled to be completed prior to the start of mezzanine work.
Girls' Bathroom
The toilet and shower floor is being raised to accommodate existing plumbing depth. A step will be incorporated in this zone, with the remainder of the bathroom at standard level.
Master Bathroom
Plumbing pipe replacement is in process. All pipes are being replaced following leaks identified during the site visit.
Additional view of master bathroom plumbing work in progress.
The toilet area floor is being raised to accommodate existing plumbing depth. A small step will be incorporated, consistent with the Girls' Bathroom approach. The washlet outlet is marked and scheduled for rough-in.
Electrical locations for the vanity and shower are confirmed and marked, covering lighting and outlets in both zones. Rough-in is scheduled.
